query: Classify these three papers into my current taxonomy and explain the strongest rejected alternative for each one.
why: Direct paper-classification request against an existing taxonomy.

query: Check whether these papers are misclassified in subcollection B and tell me which ones should move.
why: Explicit misclassification audit.

query: I’m torn between two taxonomy paths for this paper — can you adjudicate and give me a confidence level?
why: Boundary adjudication within an existing taxonomy.

query: Write a classification decision record for this paper using taxonomy version 2026-Q1.
why: Formal classification artifact request.

query: Based on the abstract and introduction, assign one main collection and one subcollection in my taxonomy.
why: Single-paper classification with explicit one-path constraint.

query: Review these already-labeled papers and separate the clearly correct ones from the ones that need reclassification or escalation.
why: Audit/reclassification workflow.

query: Does this paper expose a taxonomy gap, or does one of the existing subcollections already fit?
why: Taxonomy-gap evaluation is in scope.

query: Reclassify these papers under the latest version of the taxonomy, but only if the current labels are wrong.
why: Reclassification against a versioned taxonomy.

query: can you sort these papers into my taxonomy? a few are probably in the wrong bucket and i need the real best-fit subcollection
why: Casual phrasing for ordinary classification plus misclassification review.

query: Need a yes/no on whether this paper really belongs under the current tag, and if not where it should go.
why: Realistic audit phrasing without taxonomy jargon overload.

query: Find this paper in my library and tell me whether I have the PDF.
why: Paper discovery only; no classification task yet.

query: Summarize this paper in detail and list the key findings.
why: Summarization is adjacent but out of scope.

query: Build me a new taxonomy for all cardiovascular machine-learning papers.
why: Designing a taxonomy from scratch is out of scope.

query: Compare these ten papers and synthesize a literature review.
why: Cross-paper synthesis is not the classification task.

query: Download the PDFs for these citations and rename the files consistently.
why: Library/file management only.

query: Can you extract the methods section from this paper and turn it into bullet notes?
why: Section extraction / note-taking, not taxonomy placement.

query: Which of these journals are the most prestigious in this field?
why: Venue evaluation is unrelated to taxonomy classification.

query: Create Zotero collections for these topics and give them better names.
why: Collection design/naming is not paper-by-paper classification into an existing taxonomy.

query: just give me the tl;dr of this paper
why: Very short casual near-miss for summarization rather than classification.

query: Clean up my taxonomy labels and merge overlapping collections.
why: Taxonomy redesign/cleanup is adjacent governance work, not paper classification itself.
